project_requests_direct_requires_expert.name: project_requests_direct_requires_expert
project_requests_direct_requires_expert.value:
("project_requests"."send_to" = 'direct' AND "project_requests"."expert_profile_id" IS NOT NULL)
          OR ("project_requests"."send_to" = 'match' AND "project_requests"."expert_profile_id" IS NULL)

project_requests_budget_range.name: project_requests_budget_range
project_requests_budget_range.value:
"project_requests"."budget_min_cents" IS NULL OR "project_requests"."budget_max_cents" IS NULL
          OR "project_requests"."budget_max_cents" >= "project_requests"."budget_min_cents"

engagement_request_unique_idx.name: engagement_request_unique_idx
engagement_request_unique_idx.where: "engagements"."project_request_id" IS NOT NULL AND "engagements"."deleted_at" IS NULL

action_item_meeting_idx.name: action_item_meeting_idx
action_item_meeting_idx.where: "action_items"."meeting_id" IS NOT NULL AND "action_items"."deleted_at" IS NULL
